title: rubus × hirsutipes
intro: Rubus × hirsutipes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family, created by crossing the Himalayan black raspberry (Rubus niveus) with the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus bifrons). The medicinal properties of Rubus × hirsutipes include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus × hirsutipes can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
